x-enumDescriptions.Change of Channel: Changing customer coverage from direct to indirect or vice versa.
x-enumDescriptions.Change of VAR: Changing the Value-Added Reseller (VAR) for an existing order.
x-enumDescriptions.EPP Training: Training related to EPP (Enterprise Productivity Portfolio).
x-enumDescriptions.Evaluation License: License issued temporarily for evaluation purposes.
x-enumDescriptions.New License: Fresh order that does not involve any migration, renewal, or upgrade.
x-enumDescriptions.One Time Fee: Fee charged for a one-time service or transaction.
x-enumDescriptions.Stop (NO Parallel Use): Discontinuing an existing license with no parallel use
x-enumDescriptions.Stop - Transform: Discontinuing an existing license with a shift to a transformed model or product.
x-enumDescriptions.Stop & Parallel use: Discontinuing an existing license with parallel use
x-enumDescriptions.Suspension: Temporarily halting the license or support services.
x-enumDescriptions.Suspension Reinstatement: Reinstating a suspended license or support services.
x-enumDescriptions.Termination Of Support: Ending the support of a product or service.
